Select a conversation

MS
Maria Santos
ACA + Medicare · Miami, FL · (305) 555-0182
MS
Maria Santos · SMS · 9:01 AM
When does my plan start? I got my card in the mail but wanted to confirm.
Me
9:08 AM · Delivered
Hi Maria! Your plan starts April 1st. You are all set with BCBS Silver 87. Let me know if you have any questions!
MS
Maria Santos · SMS · 9:11 AM
Perfect, thank you so much! Do I need to do anything before April 1st?
Me
9:15 AM · Read
Nope you are all set! Just make sure to carry your insurance card when it arrives. I will send you a reminder closer to the date.
JC
Jennifer Castillo
ACA · Hialeah, FL · (305) 555-0101
JC
Jennifer Castillo · SMS · 8:42 AM
Hi! Does my plan cover my OB/GYN? I want to keep Dr. Perez.
Me
8:50 AM · Delivered
Great question! Let me check the Aetna provider network for Dr. Perez right now.
JC
Jennifer Castillo · SMS · 8:52 AM
Thank you! Also is there a deductible for OB visits?
TV
Tom Vickers
ACA · Coral Gables, FL · (305) 555-0404
TV
Tom Vickers · Email · 8:50 AM
Income Verification Upload
Hi, I need the link to upload my income verification documents. The application says it is still pending. Can you send me the upload link? Thanks, Tom
Me
9:05 AM · Sent
RE: Income Verification Upload
Hi Tom, here is your secure upload link: brokerevolve.com/upload/tv8210. Please upload your most recent pay stub or tax return. Once received we will activate your plan within 24 hours.
RM
Rosa Mendez
Medicare · Miami, FL · (305) 555-0303

Missed Call8:15 AM
🎙️
Voicemail2m 04s8:16 AM
"Hi Marcus, it is Rosa. I got a notice from my pharmacy saying my Metformin is not covered anymore. I am not sure what to do. Can you call me back when you get a chance? Thank you."
0:00 / 2m 04s
Me
9:30 AM · Delivered
Hi Rosa! I got your voicemail. I am looking into your Metformin coverage right now. I will call you back within the hour with a solution.
DF
Derek Fontaine
ACA · North Miami, FL · (305) 555-0202
DF
Derek Fontaine · SMS · Yesterday 4:22 PM
Hey when do I get my insurance card? I start a new job next week and they need proof of insurance.
Me
Yesterday 4:35 PM · Read
Hi Derek! Your card should arrive within 7-10 business days. In the meantime I can send you a digital proof of coverage letter today if you need it for your employer.
DF
Derek Fontaine · SMS · Yesterday 4:38 PM
Yes please! That would be super helpful.
Me
Yesterday 4:45 PM · Read
Sent to your email! Let me know if you need anything else.
DF
Derek Fontaine · SMS · Yesterday 4:47 PM
Got it thank you so much
GH
Grace Huang
Medicare · Aventura, FL · (305) 555-0606
GH
Grace Huang · Email · Yesterday 2:14 PM
Medicare Plan Question
Hi Marcus, I was doing some research and I am confused about the difference between Medicare Advantage (MAPD) and Medigap/Medicare Supplement plans. Which one would be better for me? I have a cardiologist I need to keep. Thank you, Grace
Me
Yesterday 3:00 PM · Sent
RE: Medicare Plan Question
Hi Grace! Great question. MAPD replaces Original Medicare and typically has lower premiums but uses a network. Medigap supplements Original Medicare and gives you more flexibility with any doctor who accepts Medicare. Given you need to keep your cardiologist, let us verify network coverage either way. I have a call slot open Thursday at 4pm — want to review your options together?
PD
Phil Dunmore
ACA + Life · Pembroke Pines, FL · (305) 555-0505
